Interface ZonaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Zona,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Zona,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Zona,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Zona,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Zona,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Zona>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Zona,Long>
public interface ZonaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Zona,Long>

      Returns:
      Optional con la zona si existe

      List<Zona> findBySede(Sede sede)
